name: Outline MCP Server
what_it_does: Outline MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Outline — the modern team knowledge base and wiki — reading and creating documents, searching the knowledge base, managing collections, and integrating Outline's collaborative documentation into agent-driven knowledge retrieval and content creation workflows.
use_cases: Searching team knowledge base for relevant information from research agents
Reading and summarizing Outline documents from knowledge agents
Creating and updating documentation from content generation agents
Finding relevant runbooks and procedures from DevOps agents
Building knowledge retrieval pipelines from RAG agents
Automating documentation updates from workflow agents
not_for: Teams not using Outline (use Notion, Confluence, or Obsidian MCPs instead)
Teams needing Notion or Confluence integration
best_when: A team using Outline for their knowledge base wants AI agents to search and create documentation — enabling knowledge-aware agents that can access the team's collective knowledge.
avoid_when: Your team uses Notion, Confluence, or another wiki — use the appropriate MCP for your actual tool.

auth.notes: Outline API token required. Generate from Outline Settings → API Tokens. Works with both cloud and self-hosted Outline instances.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Outline Cloud: free for up to 5 users
pricing.paid_tiers: Outline Cloud: $10/user/month; Self-hosted: free and open source
pricing.notes: Outline is free to self-host. Cloud has generous free tier. Community MCP is free.

performance.rate_limits: Outline API: rate limits apply; self-hosted has no external limits

known_agent_gotchas: Outline API token has broad read/write access — create dedicated token
Document structure (collections, nested docs) needs agent context
Community MCP — may not support all Outline API features
Outline API uses cursor-based pagination for large document lists
Self-hosted vs cloud Outline URLs must be configured correctly
Document content is in Markdown/Prosemirror format — agents handle well
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token access. Use read-only token for monitoring. Community MCP. Knowledge base may contain sensitive company information.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API token. Sensitive company data. Community MCP.
